query_normalized: statistical analysis of publicly available covid-19 vaccine adverse event reports statistics
rationale: This paper addresses the user's question by providing foundational methodology (category d) and empirical baselines (category c) for the statistical analysis of spontaneous adverse event reporting systems, which is the exact domain of the user's inquiry into COVID-19 vaccine reports.
